user_story: As an employee, I want to view active policies, so that I can read the rules currently in force
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Policies screen; When I choose Active policies and click Display; Then only active policy documents are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view inactive policies, so that I can review superseded or retired documents
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Policies screen; When I choose Inactive policies and click Display; Then only inactive policy documents are listed

user_story: As an employee, I want to see each policy's name and effective dates, so that I know which version applies and when
acceptance_criteria: Given policies are listed; When the list loads; Then each row shows Policy document name, Effective from and Effective till

user_story: As an employee, I want to refresh the policies list, so that I see the most current set of documents
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Policies screen; When I click Refresh; Then the policy list reloads
